Container.Name: playtorrio-web
Container.Overview: PlayTorrio **web** build (experimental): browse Stremio/TMDB-style UI in a browser. Served by nginx inside the container. **Default image:** `ghcr.io/killamfkr/playtorrio-web:latest` — pulled from **GitHub Container Registry** (no build on Unraid). Requires the repo workflow *Docker Web (GHCR)* to have run on `main` at least once. **Forks:** Change **Repository** to `ghcr.io/YOUR_GITHUB_USER/playtorrio-web:latest` after your fork’s workflow pushes. **Local build instead:** Set **Repository** to `playtorrio-web:latest`, clear **Registry**, then `docker build -f docker/web/Dockerfile -t playtorrio-web:latest .` from a repo clone. **Private GHCR:** add `ghcr.io` credentials under Docker (PAT with read:packages).

Config.Name: Web UI port
Config.Description: HTTP port (host 8089 → container 80). Change host side if 8089 is in use.
